title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week focused on stability improvements across OpsPal's platform. We fixed critical issues with Salesforce deployments that were causing failures, restored HubSpot automation capabilities that had stopped working, and improved how the platform handles complex multi-system workflows. These fixes ensure your revenue operations run more reliably.

entries.headline: Fixed Salesforce deployment failures with country picklists
details: OpsPal now properly detects when Salesforce orgs use State and Country picklists, preventing deployment errors that could break your automations.

entries.headline: Improved reliability of complex Salesforce deployments
details: Multi-step Salesforce deployments now run more smoothly with better error handling and retry logic.

entries.headline: Restored HubSpot automations that stopped working
details: Fixed a critical issue that prevented HubSpot automations from launching properly.
